use_cases: Displaying restaurant menu items with animated clip-path reveals
Showcasing products in a visually engaging rotating carousel
Creating interactive food/beverage galleries with pattern-based animations
Building animated portfolio sections with geometric reveal effects
Developing creative menu selectors with GSAP-powered transitions
ai_summary: An animated menu item display component using GSAP and SVG clip-paths to reveal food images through geometric patterns (hexagons, pixels). Features scale and stagger animations with idle breathing effects. Designed as an interactive food showcase with auto-cycling between menu categories like burgers, desserts, and waffles. Uses React hooks for state management and GSAP timelines for complex sequential animations.
